title: Egyptian Bilhili
description: A rich and creamy Egyptian yogurt dish, perfect for post-workout recovery, made with turmeric and traditionally pounded in a mortar and pestle.
instructions: Heat the ghee or oil in a kazan or large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the cumin and turmeric, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the garlic and ginger, and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the salt and black pepper.
Add the plain yogurt, and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens slightly.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the mixture to a mortar and pestle, or a blender if you prefer a smooth consistency.
Pound or blend the mixture until it is well combined and slightly thickened.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish, and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro.
Serve warm or at room temperature, ideally with some crusty bread or pita chips.
